picks.reasoning: Model's #1 course-fit player at Colonial. Precision ball-striker who doesn't rely on distance off the tee — the Colonial archetype. Bet365 +500 is near-fair value against the model's implied probability, which is the play: #1 fit at no meaningful pricing disadvantage.

Largest model-to-market gap in the top-10 field (+36.8% EV). Colonial regular with a controlled iron game and fairway accuracy that fits the course's 35% approach weight. Market has him as an afterthought; model doesn't.

Second-largest top-10 EV gap in the field (+24.2%). Approach-heavy game suits Colonial well. FanDuel at +1000 is significantly better than DraftKings — take FanDuel. Key stat to monitor: shorter-range iron accuracy through rounds 1 and 2.

Largest positive EV in the top-20 market (+40.3% at FanDuel). Steady, accurate game fits Colonial's approach profile. FanDuel at +1000 vs Bet365 +750 — take FanDuel. Medium confidence due to cut variance in the top-20 market.
